problem id: 7ff6d6c3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(4)) AND ROT(3)

examples:
  00110000 -> 00000001
  00011101 -> 01000000
  00101100 -> 00000000
  00110101 -> 00000001
  10111001 -> 01001001
  10011011 -> 11001000
  01011000 -> 00000000
  01110101 -> 00000011
  11011100 -> 00000100
  11001101 -> 01001100

query: 01100000
predicted answer: 00000010
